expertise_area: Internal Medicine, Insulin Resistance, Ketogenic Diet

key_insights.insight: Making ketones routinely can reverse many chronic diseases and improve overall health.
key_insights.quote: Most of the reasons people come to see me could be reversed if they knew how to make ketones on a regular basis.

key_insights.insight: High insulin levels, often caused by processed foods and late-night eating, contribute to inflammation and chronic diseases.
key_insights.quote: The high insulin levels in a healthy person hides that the debris is being made and you don't know it.

key_insights.insight: Burning ketones is a cleaner fuel for the body, producing less cellular trash and functioning as an antioxidant.
key_insights.quote: When you're burning a ketone, there's less trash. Okay? It is a cleaner fuel with less byproduct, especially as you age...burning ketones is an antioxidant state.

key_insights.insight: The ketogenic diet isn't just about restricting carbs; it's about shifting the body's primary fuel source to fat and understanding the role of insulin.
key_insights.quote: The ketogenic diet doesn't fail if you just follow the chemistry.The ketogenic diet fails when you have humans who've had wounds, who've had a history, who have stress, who don't sleep.

key_insights.insight: Glycogen stores must be depleted before the body can effectively start producing ketones.
key_insights.quote: You cannot make a ketone. You cannot burn fat until that tank is empty.

key_insights.insight: Chronically elevated insulin can prevent the body from properly utilizing Vitamin D and may require targeted dietary intervention for its normalization.
key_insights.quote: What happened was she lowered her insulin and now fat can move around in her body like it's supposed to...Part of that fat isn't just her estrogen. It was her vitamin D.

key_insights.insight: Creatine is not just for muscle building; it significantly enhances brain function and can aid in jet lag recovery.
key_insights.quote: It's a brain thing...Like your reset of sleep is going to be augmented if you take like 20 grams of it after the flight, 10 in the morning, 10 at night.

key_insights.insight: Consuming a fatty meal late at night has ten times the caloric impact of eating it before noon, so move the bulk of your calories earlier in the day as you age.
key_insights.quote: One bite of food after 6 o'clock is worth 10 bites of food before noon.

actionable_advice.advice: Eat sardines for three days to kickstart ketosis.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consume only sardines for three days, eating as much as desired, to provide high fat and protein.

actionable_advice.advice: Move calories to the morning and reduce late-night eating.
actionable_advice.how_to: Prioritize eating earlier in the day, as calories consumed after 6 PM have a disproportionately larger impact on insulin production and fat storage.

actionable_advice.advice: Test blood ketone levels regularly to track progress.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a blood ketone meter to measure levels, aiming for 0.5 or greater without a triple digit blood sugar reading, and track the Dr. Bob's ratio to see if you are burning fat.

actionable_advice.advice: For those struggling to make ketones, increase dietary fat intake
actionable_advice.how_to: Focus on consuming fat forward meals centered around foods such as pork belly, eggs, beef brisket and ribs.

memorable_stories: Dr. Bosworth's mother reverses cancer through ketogenic diet.
Woman with Down syndrome regains cognitive abilities after adopting ketogenic diet.
Dr. Bosworth's story of running for U.S. Senate and facing criminal charges.
contrarian_claims: Fiber is not essential for a healthy gut microbiome.
Vitamin D gets stuck in fat and is unusable in insulin-resistant individuals
The best way to test for elevated blood sugar is not through traditional methods but through testing first thing in the morning for five days.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Insulin Doctor: This Is The First Sign Of Dementia! The Shocking Link Between Keto & Brain Decline!
